trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all three momentum signals aligned — RSI 55 in the ideal bullish zone, MACD crossover, and histogram rising — uranium energy is a clean setup without overbought risk.
Score 95 with RSI 55.9 in the bullish zone and all MACD signals positive; low-price financial services name adds sector diversification to a tech-heavy portfolio.
Score 95 with RSI 55.4 and bullish MACD crossover plus rising histogram; price just above SMA-20 suggests early-stage momentum rather than extended breakout.

decisions.briefing: Markets are essentially flat today (S&P -0.1%, NASDAQ -0.2%), a neutral tape that offers no reason to pause new entries. With 5 open slots and $1,173 cash sitting idle, I'm deploying into the three cleanest score-95 setups — UEC, WU, and RGC — all of which have RSI in the ideal 55–70 range rather than the overbought zone crowding much of the rest of the screener. Existing positions in GOOGL, QQQ, AMZN, MSTR, and AAOI are held; none are near stop-loss or profit-target levels based on available data.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted slightly lower Monday, with the S&P 500 off 0.1% and the NASDAQ down 0.2%, as investors traded cautiously ahead of a heavy week of Big Tech earnings and key economic releases. The session lacked a single dominant catalyst, with traders balancing lingering trade-policy uncertainty against resilient corporate earnings so far this cycle. Energy and defensive names held up better than growth-oriented tech, suggesting mild risk-off rotation without a full flight to safety.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一小幅收跌，標普500指數微降0.1%，納斯達克下滑0.2%。投資者在科技巨頭業績公布及重要經濟數據發布前保持審慎，市場未見明確單一催化劑。貿易政策的不確定性與本輪財報季整體穩健表現之間形成拉鋸，資金出現輕微防禦性輪動，能源及防守股表現優於成長型科技股，但整體並未演變為明顯的避險行情。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that show signs of sustained upward movement — measured by indicators like RSI (strength of recent price gains) and MACD (trend direction and acceleration). The sweet spot is RSI between 55–70: strong enough to confirm a trend, but not so high that the stock is overbought and due for a pullback. Today's buys (UEC, WU, RGC) all sit in that zone, which is why they rank above higher-RSI tickers that score lower despite appearing to move faster.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是指買入技術指標顯示持續上升趨勢的股票，常用指標包括RSI（衡量近期漲幅強度）及MACD（判斷趨勢方向與加速度）。最理想的進場區間是RSI介於55至70之間：趨勢夠強、確認動能，但又未進入超買區域、面臨回調風險。今日買入的UEC、WU及RGC均落在這個甜蜜區，這也是它們排名優先於部分RSI更高、看似漲勢更猛但實為超買股票的原因。
